name: Qorvo, Inc.
description: Qorvo, Inc. is an American multinational semiconductor company that specializes in the design, development, and manufacturing of high-performance radio frequency (RF) solutions and power management technologies. Formed in 2015 through the merger of TriQuint Semiconductor and RF Micro Devices, the company provides critical components for wireless, wired, and power markets. Qorvo's extensive product portfolio supports a wide range of applications, including mobile devices, defense and aerospace systems, automotive electronics, and infrastructure for 5G and Wi-Fi networks, helping to connect and power the modern digital world.
